argv:
set -euo pipefail
git diff --name-only -z origin/main...HEAD -- "*.json" | xargs -0 -r -n 1 env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
git ls-files -z --modified --others --exclude-standard "*.json" | xargs -0 -r -n 1 env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m json.tool >/dev/null
printf "CHANGED_JSON_OK\n"

argv:

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
git diff --check
printf "GIT_DIFF_CHECK_OK\n"
commands.summary: Committed and dirty diffs contain no whitespace errors.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
sidecars=$(find . -path "./.git" -prune -o -type f \( -name "*.new" -o -name "*.bak" -o -name "*.rej" -o -name "*.orig" \) -print)
test -z "$sidecars"
printf "REPOSITORY_SIDECARS=0\n"
commands.summary: Repository has no .new, .bak, .rej or .orig sidecars.
guru-sync-base shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.
guru-discover-change-context shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.
guru-clarify-requirements shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.
guru-review-contract-wording shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.
guru-review-change-request shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.
guru-create-task-workspace shared production eval corpus passed through the real public wrapper.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
skills=(guru-sync-base guru-discover-change-context guru-clarify-requirements guru-review-contract-wording guru-review-change-request guru-create-task-workspace)
targets=(.trellis/guru-team/skills/packages .agents/skills .codex/skills .claude/skills .cursor/skills)
checks=0
for skill in "${skills[@]}"; do
  source_dir="trellis/skills/guru-team/packages/$skill"
  for target_root in "${targets[@]}"; do
    target_dir="$target_root/$skill"
    diff -qr "$source_dir" "$target_dir" >/dev/null
    while IFS= read -r source_file; do
      relative_file="${source_file#$source_dir/}"
      target_file="$target_dir/$relative_file"
      cmp -s "$source_file" "$target_file"
      [[ "$(stat -f "%Lp" "$source_file")" == "$(stat -f "%Lp" "$target_file")" ]]
    done < <(find "$source_dir" -type f -print)
    checks=$((checks+1))
  done
done
[[ "$checks" -eq 30 ]]
printf "PACKAGE_PARITY=%s/30\n" "$checks"
commands.summary: Canonical, installed, shared, Codex, Claude and Cursor package bytes/modes parity passed for 30 package roots.

argv:
set -euo pipefail
changed=$( { git diff --name-only origin/main...HEAD; git diff --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; } | LC_ALL=C sort -u )
for entry in "CI:^\\.github/workflows/" "CONTAINER:(^|/)(Dockerfile[^/]*|docker-compose[^/]*)(/|$)" "K8S:(^|/)(k8s|kustomize)(/|$)" "HELM:(^|/)helm(/|$)" "DB:(^|/)(database/migrations|db/migrations)(/|$)" "MAKE:(^|/)Makefile$" "DEPS:(^|/)(package-lock\\.json|pnpm-lock\\.yaml|yarn\\.lock|go\\.mod|go\\.sum|requirements[^/]*\\.txt|pyproject\\.toml|Pipfile\\.lock)$"; do
  label="${entry%%:*}"
  pattern="${entry#*:}"
  matches=$(printf "%s\n" "$changed" | rg "$pattern" || true)
  test -z "$matches"
  printf "%s_PATHS=0\n" "$label"
done
jq -e '(.skills|length)==6 and ([.skills[].id]|sort)==(["guru-clarify-requirements","guru-create-task-workspace","guru-discover-change-context","guru-review-change-request","guru-review-contract-wording","guru-sync-base"]|sort) and ([.skills[].exit_bindings[]]|length)==24' trellis/skills/guru-team/migrations/stage0-minimal-handoff.json >/dev/null
printf "STAGE0_SET=6/24\n"
secret_matches=$( { git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=0 origin/main...HEAD; git diff --no-ext-diff --unified=0; } | rg 'BEGIN (RSA|OPENSSH|EC|DSA) PRIVATE KEY|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}' || true)
test -z "$secret_matches"
printf "SECRET_MATERIAL_MATCHES=0\n"
commands.summary: No CI/CD, container, K8s, Helm, DB, Makefile or dependency paths changed; Stage0 set is 6/24 and secret-shaped diff matches are zero.
